overall.description: Cinematic game footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a first-person walk along a coastal highway during golden hour. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road while mountains and the ocean frame the scene, with distant futuristic buildings visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway sidewalk with ocean view

events.description: futuristic black sedan passes by on the left side of the highway
dark SUV overtakes and passes by on the left lane

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the coastal highway sidewalk with the ocean to the right

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving at moderate speed along the highway

entered.detail: concrete safety barrier separating the sidewalk from the coastal drop-off
multi-lane asphalt road with yellow dividing lines and moderate traffic
distant mountain silhouettes visible against the golden hour sky
calm ocean visible beyond the concrete barrier wall
wooden utility poles with overhead power lines running parallel to the road
arid rocky terrain with sparse desert vegetation
futuristic structures and buildings visible on the distant hillside

segments.scene_description: Walking along a coastal highway sidewalk with a concrete barrier on the right overlooking the ocean. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road to the left, while mountains and distant buildings frame the horizon under clear golden hour skies.

events.description: green graffiti reading NO FUTURE becomes visible on the concrete barrier wall

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk passing the graffiti-covered barrier wall

entered.detail: green spray-painted graffiti with text NO FUTURE on the concrete barrier

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the coastal highway where the concrete barrier wall now features prominent green graffiti. The road maintains moderate traffic with various futuristic vehicles passing by, and the distant buildings appear closer as the walk progresses.

events.description: approaching intersection where the sidewalk meets a dirt and sand turnoff area
futuristic blue sports car turns right from the highway onto the dirt intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the intersection area, observing vehicles navigating the turn

notable_agents.action: futuristic blue sports car turning right onto the dirt road at the intersection

entered.detail: unpaved dirt and sand area at the highway intersection with tire tracks
utility pole with traffic control equipment and wires spanning the intersection

segments.scene_description: Approaching a highway intersection where the concrete sidewalk ends and a dirt turnoff begins. Vehicles including a blue sports car navigate the turn, while utility poles and intersection infrastructure become prominent as the camera enters the junction area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a coastal highway that transitions from a scenic seaside path into a functional industrial intersection. It begins on a sidewalk beside a concrete barrier overlooking the ocean, with futuristic vehicles streaming past under a clear golden hour sky. As the camera progresses, the concrete wall shifts to feature prominent green graffiti while the distant futuristic skyline gradually looms closer. The scene then opens up as the sidewalk ends, shifting the terrain to a dirt turnoff where utility poles and intersection infrastructure become prominent. Finally, the camera enters the junction area, passing a blue sports car as it navigates the turn.
